hero.badge: Powered by Claude AI — Live analysis
hero.desc: Designed for Turkish sellers. 1/5 the price of Helium 10, with 5x smarter features.

features.title: Features competitors
features.niche_desc: 100-point AI analysis system. BSR history, RVI and trend score all evaluated together.
features.lovehate_desc: Claude AI analyzes your competitors' reviews. Catch product improvement opportunities.
features.euro_desc: VAT-inclusive arbitrage across 7 European markets. Buy on Amazon.de, sell in the US.
features.supplier_desc: Alternative to Alibaba. Leverage Made in Turkey advantage in global markets.
features.scanner_desc: Bulk scan 500 ASINs. Automatically detect and capture competitor-free opportunities.
features.paneu_desc: Net profit calculation across 9 European markets including VAT and FBA fees.

roadmap.subtitle: Where we are and where we're going

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Try free for 7 days. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I try without a credit card?
faq.a1: Yes! When you sign up, all Pro features are free for 7 days. No credit card required.
faq.q2: How is it different from Helium 10?
faq.a2: Turkish interface, Turkish supplier module, Euro Flips and Trendyol integration. At 1/5 the price of Helium 10.
faq.a3: Yes, anytime. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.
faq.q4: Which Amazon marketplaces do you support?
faq.a4: 15+ markets including US, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, UK, Canada, Japan.

cta.subtitle: All Pro features free for 7 days. No credit card required.
